sections.title: REFERENCES
sections.llm_prompt: Generate a references list for a validation protocol (IQ/OQ/PQ) covering {process_type} for {product_name}. Include relevant SOPs with GMP prefixes (EQ-, GN-, PR-, QA-, TM-), regulatory citations (21 CFR 211, ICH Q7, ICH Q9), and any equipment manuals. {description}

sections.title: PURPOSE AND SCOPE
sections.llm_prompt: Write the Purpose and Scope section for a validation protocol for {process_type} used in {product_name} manufacturing. State the intent (IQ, OQ, PQ), equipment/system under validation, boundaries, and products affected. {description}

default_data.text: This protocol defines the installation, operational, and performance qualification activities required to demonstrate that the subject equipment/system meets its intended use for GMP manufacturing.

sections.title: RESPONSIBILITIES
sections.llm_prompt: Generate the Responsibilities section listing roles (Validation Lead, Engineering, Manufacturing, Quality Assurance, Metrology) and what each is accountable for during the validation of {process_type}.

default_data.text:
Validation Lead: Owns protocol execution and final report.
Engineering: Installation verification and utilities hookup.
Manufacturing: Operational runs and process data collection.
Quality Assurance: Protocol/report approval and deviation oversight.
Metrology: Instrument calibration and traceability.

sections.title: SYSTEM DESCRIPTION
sections.llm_prompt: Describe the system/equipment under validation for {process_type} in {product_name}. Include make, model, intended use, critical components, utilities, software, and operating ranges. {description}

sections.title: ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
sections.llm_prompt: List the acceptance criteria for validating {process_type}. Include measurable pass/fail criteria for identity, calibration status, operating ranges, alarms, and performance outputs. Structure as a numbered list.

sections.title: Installation Qualification (IQ)
sections.llm_prompt: Generate Installation Qualification (IQ) checks for {process_type} equipment used in {product_name}. Include equipment identification, drawing verification, utility connections, calibration certificates, material of construction, software version, and environmental conditions.

sections.title: Operational Qualification (OQ)
sections.llm_prompt: Generate Operational Qualification (OQ) tests for {process_type}. Include range testing, alarm challenges, interlock verification, user access controls, data integrity, power failure recovery, and SOP verification.

sections.title: Performance Qualification (PQ)
sections.llm_prompt: Generate Performance Qualification (PQ) runs for {process_type} of {product_name}. Include at least three consecutive runs at normal operating conditions, sampling plans, critical quality attributes, and statistical acceptance criteria.

default_data.text: Any deviation from this protocol shall be documented in a Validation Deviation Record, assessed for impact, and dispositioned per QA-010 before protocol closure.
